execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      let category = if n <= 3
        "short"
      else if n <= 7
        "medium"
      else
        "long"
      end
      println("#{line} -> #{category}")
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
